entry.title: Re: Migrating Selection Screen Variants
entry.content: I cannot see any attachment, kindly update, thanks.

entry.title: Re: Unable to add an exteral URL in SAP Build apps using...
entry.content: Well, me personally have no experience with Datadog, so possibly you could reach out to them as well. Or write more insight about your issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP subaccount trial Login Error
entry.content: Sorry, I focused on the error screen but not on the fact that you are using abap-trial. Unfortunately, custom IdP is not supported (see https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/it-s-trial-time-for-abap-in-sap-business-technology-platform/ba-p/13416047). You have to authenticate using SAP ID service. Is SAP ID service offered when logging on? If not, please make sure to enable it for logon in the Trust Configuration in the BTP cockpit. I will post this as second answer, such that it can be found more easily by other members of the community.

entry.title: Setting up the ledgers in the right way for Two-Tier Scenario
entry.content:
Dear experts

in the product expert training session in April Nicoleta Cernea gives advise how to set-up the ledgers using parallel ledger accounting. What was not especially advised is the recommended set-up for Two-Tier szenarios.

The customer is a company in Germany with subsidaries in USA, India and China. The subsidaries will be implemented in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. The corporate accounting of the group is the German GAAP (HGB).

Are there any recommendation from SAP side how to deal with this.

Best regards

Yannick

entry.title: Re: Unable to add an exteral URL in SAP Build apps using...
entry.content:
Hi Mithaly,
Ok leave the datadog part. Now i have added the URL in a html code and made that a hyperlink button as well.
When i am clicking the button,the URL and the content is not loading and i am getting a white screen only. Do i need to add some logic to load the URL in same page ? please suggest

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2
entry.content: Here is my week 2 Submission

entry.title: Re: Unable to add an exteral URL in SAP Build apps using...
entry.content:
Hi Mithaly, 

Ok leave the datadog part. Now i have added the URL in a html code and made that a hyperlink button as well.
When i am clicking the button,the URL and the content is not loading and i am getting a white screen only. Do i need to add some logic to load the URL in same page ? please suggest

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2
Re: What is the difference between Length, Decimal Places...
entry.content:
Hello @yalcin_mete 

Length is the domain length including decimal places excluding format characters.

In your case, the domain is WERT11, length 11, decimal places 2. It means you can store there 9 digits of integer part. 

Output length is 14, which includes format characters i.e. thousands separator and decimal point:

  • 123.456.789,00
  • 123,456,789.00

depending on your decimal notation setting.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2
entry.content: Great learning experience!

entry.title: Object type definition for an outbound IDoc
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using an output sent from several docs (SO, PO, Outbound delivery and inbound one), output that creates an IDoc which transmits some info to the transportation team.

Those IDocs can be seen in the so-called 'GOS' or Services for Object, window that can either be called when in a doc via the 'System' menu -> Services for Object and 'Display relationships' or be defaulted with the PUID 'SD_SWU_ACTIVE' value X in SU3 and the relationships submenu in that window.

And this works well for the SO, for the PO, for the OBD, but not for the inbound one.

I understood why (see that post), the issue is caused by the object type created by the IDoc in table SRRELROLES.

The object type for the IDoc created for the SO is BUS2032, the one for the PO IDoc is BUS2012, the one for the OBD IDoc is LIKP.

And the one for the IBD IDoc is LIKP too, what is causing the issue.

I copied in SRRELROLES table the line for one IBD IDoc and changed the object type to BUS2015, and the IDoc is now visible in the GOS window.

I tried to find where the object type could be defined for a processing FM, an IDoc type, a message function and a message variant (to not negatively impact the working behaviour for the OBD IDoc), but I wasn't successful (I thought having found the right thing with WE57, but that didn't work).

Any idea how I could define the object type for my IDoc, message function and message variant?

Maybe I missed something 'before' WE57.

Thanks for your help.

BR

Yan

entry.title: Re: Migrating Selection Screen Variants
entry.content: Why don't you just use the standard RSTRANSP report?

entry.title: Error in SOAP Sender adapter SAP CPI
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have a SOAP to SOAP scenario in SAP CPI. The target web service expects the request with SOAP envelope along with wsse:Security headers. This is built in the source system and sent to CPI as it is. The request coming to CPI looks something like this:

But it is currently failing at the SOAP sender adapter with the following error:

Could someone please explain what needs to be done? Currently I am not able to understand why the request is not even going into the iFlow. It simplay always fails at the sender SOAP adapter. It works when I remove the security headers from the SOAP envelope. I have set the "Service Definition" as Manual in the SOAP sender. Any help would be appreciated. Thanks!

Regards,

Faisal

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP subaccount trial Login Error
entry.content:
Hi @Aravindha, 

from the screenshot I derive that you do not use SAP ID service but your own instance of the SAP Identity Services - Authentication Service. Unfortunately, this is not supported by the ABAP environment trial (see https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/it-s-trial-time-for-abap-in-sap-business-technology-platform/ba-p/13416047). When using the trial, you must authenticate using SAP ID Service.

If usage of SAP ID Service is not offered when logging on, please make sure to enable it for logon in the Trust Configuration in the BTP cockpit.

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: Re: Object type definition for an outbound IDoc
entry.content: It's not clear what you are describing in totality in your post, but best guess is you are maybe referring to WE42.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 3
entry.content:
For anyone trying to follow this:

10. Create a dataset schema artifact with the POST Create Dataset Schema Artifact Regression request (the required values were assigned automatically to your environment)

The scenarioid is not automatically assigned.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 3
entry.content: After much wailing and gnashing of teeth:

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between Length, Decimal Places...
entry.content:
Hi Yalçın,

"Length" determines the maximum length that a variable type can have. So in your example field NETPR(11,2) with CURR type can hold value max 11 like 123456789.12 or 123456789.00 *

"Output Length" is determines the length for the display including thousand and decimals separators. For examples above like 123,456,789.12 or 123,456,789.00 which are 14 length. *

*Just corrected examples with Sandra's warnings. Thanks.

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: How to convert dependent table on cloud
entry.content:
Hi Barış,

Please check out Adjust and activate table on cloud There are tips & tricks. 

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: What is the Access Sequenz in EWM RF Logging for?
entry.content:
Hello community, 

during the RF Log activation in EWM, an access sequence must be maintained in trx /SCWM/RFLOGACT - Activate Radio Frequency Log. I already tried various configurations, but it is still unclear to me, what is affected by the access sequence. 

Anyone has an idea? SAP help, books and other sources are not helpful in this case.

entry.title: Ariba Environment Cloning - Refreshing TEST instance with PROD configuration and data?
entry.content:
Good morning,

Looking for community advice on the best method or way to "clone" production down to a lower envrionment like Test. I am looking to re-configure and clean Test to ensure a close to real data environment, but I do not see any functionality for our developers to initiate this. How can I facilitate this with Ariba?

entry.title: Re: URL Encoding in fiori master detail application
entry.content:
This is still not working for me:
this.getView().byId("textfieldid").getValue().encodeURIComponent();
is giving me
Uncaught TypeError: this.getView(...).byId(...).getValue(...).encodeURIComponent is not a function

entry.title: Re: URL Encoding in fiori master detail application
entry.content: (8 years later 😂)

entry.title: Re: Expand event in sap.m.Tree
entry.content:
Hello, guys!

I believe that have the solution:
In XML:

Set toggleOpenState

 

<TreeTable
            id="idTreeTableObjTec"
            selectionMode="None"
            enableColumnReordering="false"
            toggleOpenState="onExpandNode"
            rows="{mMyModel>/}">
                    .
                    .
                    .
</TreeTable>

 

 In controller.js:

 

onExpandNode: function (oEvent) {
      if (oEvent.getParameter("expanded") === true) {
            let sPath     = oEvent.getParameter("rowContext").getPath(),
            oModelTree    = this.getView().getModel("mMyModel"),
            context      = oModelTree.getObject(sPath);
            console.log(context.nodeID);
      }
}

entry.title: Re: RISE with SAP: Adopting to Zero Trust Architecture Principles with SAP Cloud Services
entry.content: Insightful...

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Extraction Filter for M2S JCDS
entry.content:
Hi @EvanR, I can confirm that there are values that start with OR (see screenshot). Here it is also clear again that the suggested code works, because I have just loaded the complete JCDS table. 

Regards  Niels

entry.title: Re: From A to Z: Setup a Starter System of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
entry.content:
Hi George,

Many thanks for this helpful blog.

My question is with regard  development and customizing tenants during implementation project (not starter tenants).

Do we have to do the complete exact same scoping activity on both tenants ?

Regards,

Lakhdar

entry.title: Can we provide access to all managers having vacant or assigned positions
entry.content: Is it possible to provide access to all manager access to position org chart having vacant or assigned position, giving access to manager role is not working in scenarios where a manager has only one position which is vacant, we would like to provide access to all users who have vacant or filled positions and ensuring users who are not assigned any position are not able to view position org chart, is this possible?

entry.title: Re: How To Upload Data to a Public or Private Planning Version Using a File Upload Custom Widget Wi
entry.content:
Hi Gerd,

We tried the widget to upload transactional data including the update of private dimensions.
This seems only to work when a role is assigned that allows full access to all data in the model.

We also tried the masterdata import, but the same issue here. If the above is not assigned we
get the message "failed during validation for job". The normal "import fact" is working even without
the above setting.

In our case we want the endusers to use this widget, but they would not have full acess to all data in the model, but access based of the R/W column in the dimension.

Is there something I'm missing here, or is MasterData update not possible for "Import MasterData" and "Import MasterData & Fact" without full model access.

Thanks a lot for your guidance.

Kind regards,
Sam

entry.title: Re: UI adapt using SAP BAS
entry.content: Its a Transactional Fiori App created using ABAP Restful Programming Model

entry.title: Re: From A to Z: Setup a Starter System of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
entry.content:
Hi Lakhdar,

Yes. The reason is that the Starter System uses prepared/standard master data, like 1701 for company code in US, etc. When you work on your own systems (D/T/P), you will build your own organization structure, company code, etc., even you will activate the same scope items.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: Homepage banner sizing with 1H 2024 release
entry.content: We're testing in our staging instance and I'm seeing the same. Different resolution sizes on monitors are throwing off the alignment of the new customizable banners.

entry.title: PO REST adapter loses ODATA attributes when converting JSON response to XML
entry.content:
Hello,

We are trying to implement a simple data query from SAP PO to a Sharepoint server via Microsoft Graph API.

It seems nowadays MS Graph API only supports json, so we need to convert json response to xml in the REST receiver channel. Json response contains ODATA elements in the beginning of the json body, we need these elements to be able to read the next page (element @odata.nextLink):

However, after conversion to XML (with wrapper element) these ODATA elements are lost:

We have tried all possible combinations of settings in the REST channel, including JSON to XML name mapping, but ODATA elements just will not be there. The only way is not to add the wrapper element in XML conversion, in this case a very strange structure will be returned, with ODATA elements but without the business data:

Is there any way to make conversion is such a way that both ODATA and business payload are preserved? Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: What is the actual URL endpoint for using a deployment for chat completions in SAP AI Core?
entry.content:
Hello all, 

TLDR: If you have a deployment of an azure-openai model, which path do you call to get chat completions?

 

We have a deployment visible in AI launchpad and in status running. This is ID dd5....b5

This is tied to a configuration that is using azure openai model (we intend to use gpt-3.5turbo).

 

In postman, we can make requests to endpoints such as /lm/deployments and indeed get information about the deployment. Showing that the authentication to the API is working. Example:

 

Now, we'd like to call the endpoint to get "chat completions". i.e. passing a prompt and get a completion back.

Examples online suggest that completions are available under /v2/inference/deployments/<deploymentid>/v2/completions but this fails with a 404: 

Indeed we found some conflicting info online and decided to try variations of the differents paths. They always return either a 404 or a 403.

Paths tested:

/v2/inference/deployments/dd5...b5/

/v2/inference/deployments/dd5...b5/v2/completions

/v2/inference/deployments/dd5...b5/v2/completion

/v2/inference/deployments/dd5...b5/v2/chat

/v2/inference/deployments/dd5...b5/v2/chat-completion

/v2/inference/deployments/dd5...b5/v2/query

/v2/inference/deployments/dd5...b5/chat-completion

/v2/inference/deployments/dd5...b5/chat

/v2/inference/deployments/dd5...b5/completions

/v2/inference/deployments/dd5...b5/query

 

These paths also fail but with 403 forbidden RBAC: access denied

/v2/lm/deployments/dd5...b5/v2/query

/v2/lm/deployments/dd5...b5/v2/completions

/v2/lm/deployments/dd5...b5/v2/chat-completions

.../chat/completions?api-version=v2

 

References and examples from the web:

This example suggest it should be /v2/inference/deployments/<YOUR_AICORE_DEPLOYMENT_ID>/v2/chat-completion 

This example suggests it's either /v2/completion or /v2/chat-completion at the end.

The CAP LLM plugin sample suggests it's /chat/completions with an apiversion parameter with an undocumented value

This person is similarly confused about which path to use.

Question

Do you know what is the correct path please? Any help appreciated.

 

@Nora

entry.title: Re: How to enable activation email in IAS for manual impo...
entry.content:
Hi Shaji,

After you import the user list, there is a Send button (see picture), that's how you send the activation email out to the users.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services - Week 2
entry.content: Was a great learning experience, thanks!

entry.title: Re: Setting up the ledgers in the right way for Two-Tier...
entry.content:
Hi Yannick,

This is a complex question that has multiple possible solutions… Usually for USA you will need the USGP accounting principle and for India you could potentially need an alternative Fiscal Year Variant .

That said, without additional information I would suggest to:

  • Activate the Scope Items 1GA (which enables ledger 2L - IFRS) and 2VA (which enables ledger 3L – USGP). Scope Item J58 (which enables ledger 0L) is mandatory.
  • Leave ledger 0L as leading with the German GAAP and select one of the parallel ledgers to manage the local accounting principles and (potentially) the alternative Fiscal Year Variant

You can see some additional information in the following blogs:

  • SAP Recommendation: Assignment of Corporate Accounting Principle to Ledger
  • Assign Accounting Principles to Ledgers and Company Codes
  • Ledger Scenarios: Choosing the Right Combination for Your Business Needs
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition: Options for Accounting Principles and Ledgers 

Please review with the Partner and customer to confirm that this is aligned with the business requirements since, as I mentioned at the beginning, the flexibility that the system provide is high but it has to support the Global and Local legal requirements.

If you have additional comments or questions please add them here so the community can help.

I hope this helps!

 

Ernesto Cepeda

entry.title: Re: Nuevo subsidio al empleo 2024 Mexico
entry.content: Hola Liseth, lograste evaluar que opción usar? Sabes si SAP va a entregar alguna nota para esto? Gracias!

entry.title: Is there a possibility to set default Item Category based on Incoterms entered at Sales Order level?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus, 

The requirement: When creating a sales order that includes incoterms, the item category on the item line should default to YXXX. Also please also let me know if we can do something in the sales contract to avoid enhancement.

As per my research I did not find any blog or answers related to my requirement. Can anyone tell me is this possible? 

Regards,

Vardhan K

#SAP SD SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Re: Enabling the Promote feature within SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Good afternoon, thanks for the post,

Using the "Promote" functionality, will it still be necessary to recapture the screens once transported to production? If we take the case of SAP S4 Hana Cloud, the screens captured from the Dev environment have a red banner in which it is indicated "test XXX/123". While in production environment is not present. The data captured is also different (url, domain etc...)

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: BAS: Testing a destination: Error 'no such host'
entry.content:
Hello, did you resolve this?

I'm having the same issue at the moment.

 

Thank you in advance.

Eva.

entry.title: Groovy Script Parse Error
entry.content:
Can you help me with a SAP CPI groovy script ?
Objective : I want to merge the content of an exchange property with XML content and the incoming payload by referencing a key <userId> in my case.

the sample format of the xml in the exchange property is this

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<rootA>
	<cust_A_WFM>
		<cust_ADPWFMStatus>I</cust_ADPWFMStatus>
		<externalCodeNav>
			<User>
				<userId>123456</userId>
			</User>
		</externalCodeNav>
		<lastModifiedDateTime>*</lastModifiedDateTime>
		<externalCode>*</externalCode>
		<effectiveStartDate>*</effectiveStartDate>
	</cust_ADP_WFM>
	<cust_ADP_WFM>
		<cust_ADPWFMStatus>I</cust_ADPWFMStatus>
		<externalCodeNav>
			<User>
				<userId>987654</userId>
			</User>
		</externalCodeNav>
		<lastModifiedDateTime>*</lastModifiedDateTime>
		<externalCode>*</externalCode>
		<effectiveStartDate>2*</effectiveStartDate>
	</cust_A_WFM>
</rootA>

While the incoming payload, is this 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<rootEmpJob>
	<EmpJob>
		<employeeTypeNav>
			<PicklistOption>
				<picklistLabels>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>WC</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>White Collar</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
				</picklistLabels>
				<externalCode>W</externalCode>
			</PicklistOption>
		</employeeTypeNav>
		<userNav/>
		<employmentTypeNav>
			<PicklistOption>
				<picklistLabels>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>A</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>A</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
				</picklistLabels>
				<externalCode>*</externalCode>
			</PicklistOption>
		</employmentTypeNav>
		<lastModifiedDateTime>2024-04-17T10:19:37.000</lastModifiedDateTime>
		<locationNav>
			<FOLocation>
				<externalCode>*</externalCode>
				<addressNavDEFLT>
					<FOCorporateAddressDEFLT>
						<country>DNK</country>
						<countryNav>
							<Territory>
								<territoryCode>DNK</territoryCode>
							</Territory>
						</countryNav>
					</FOCorporateAddressDEFLT>
				</addressNavDEFLT>
			</FOLocation>
		</locationNav>
		<costCenter>1</costCenter>
		<customString5Nav/>
		<customString5/>
		<jobCode>1</jobCode>
		<employmentNav>
			<EmpEmployment>
				<customDate21>2020-11-16T00:00:00.000</customDate21>
				<customDate1/>
				<customDate2/>
				<customDate3/>
				<seniorityDate>2020-11-16T00:00:00.000</seniorityDate>
			</EmpEmployment>
		</employmentNav>
		<customString24>*</customString24>
		<userId>*</userId>
		<eventReason>A</eventReason>
		<customDouble1>1</customDouble1>
		<fte>1.0</fte>
		<employeeClassNav>
			<PicklistOption>
				<picklistLabels>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>*</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>*</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
				</picklistLabels>
				<externalCode>1</externalCode>
			</PicklistOption>
		</employeeClassNav>
		<company>1</company>
		<location>2</location>
		<department>3</department>
	</EmpJob>
	<EmpJob>
		<employeeTypeNav>
			<PicklistOption>
				<picklistLabels>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>WC</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>C</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
				</picklistLabels>
				<externalCode>W</externalCode>
			</PicklistOption>
		</employeeTypeNav>
		<userNav>
			<User>
				<firstName>m</firstName>
				<lastName>d</lastName>
				<manager>
					<User>
						<userId>*</userId>
						<RehireNewSAPID/>
					</User>
				</manager>
				<externalCodeOfcust_ADP_WFMNav>
					<cust_ADP_WFM>
						<cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
							<cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
								<cust_FactoryID>*</cust_FactoryID>
								<cust_Payrule>*</cust_Payrule>
								<cust_persontypeNav>
									<PickListValueV2>
										<label_defaultValue>label</label_defaultValue>
									</PickListValueV2>
								</cust_persontypeNav>
								<cust_accrualprofile>*</cust_accrualprofile>
								<cust_persontype>*</cust_persontype>
								<cust_Countrycode>PL</cust_Countrycode>
							</cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
						</cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
					</cust_ADP_WFM>
					<cust_ADP_WFM>
						<cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
							<cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
								<cust_FactoryID></cust_FactoryID>
								<cust_Payrule></cust_Payrule>
								<cust_persontypeNav>
									<PickListValueV2>
										<label_defaultValue></label_defaultValue>
									</PickListValueV2>
								</cust_persontypeNav>
								<cust_accrualprofile></cust_accrualprofile>
								<cust_persontype></cust_persontype>
								<cust_Countrycode></cust_Countrycode>
							</cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
						</cust_ADP_WFMDetails>
					</cust_ADP_WFM>
				</externalCodeOfcust_ADP_WFMNav>
				<dateOfBirth>1980-01-01T00:00:00.000</dateOfBirth>
				<mi/>
				<email>dummy</email>
				<RehireNewSAPID>*</RehireNewSAPID>
				<status>t</status>
				<username>MIDOZ</username>
			</User>
		</userNav>
		<employmentTypeNav>
			<PicklistOption>
				<picklistLabels>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label></label>
					</PicklistLabel>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label></label>
					</PicklistLabel>
				</picklistLabels>
				<externalCode></externalCode>
			</PicklistOption>
		</employmentTypeNav>
		<lastModifiedDateTime>2024-04-16T10:24:39.000</lastModifiedDateTime>
		<locationNav>
			<FOLocation>
				<externalCode></externalCode>
				<addressNavDEFLT>
					<FOCorporateAddressDEFLT>
						<country>POL</country>
						<countryNav>
							<Territory>
								<territoryCode>POL</territoryCode>
							</Territory>
						</countryNav>
					</FOCorporateAddressDEFLT>
				</addressNavDEFLT>
			</FOLocation>
		</locationNav>
		<costCenter>*</costCenter>
		<customString5Nav/>
		<customString5/>
		<jobCode>*</jobCode>
		<employmentNav>
			<EmpEmployment>
				<customDate21>2011-08-01T00:00:00.000</customDate21>
				<customDate1/>
				<customDate2/>
				<customDate3/>
				<seniorityDate>2024-04-16T00:00:00.000</seniorityDate>
			</EmpEmployment>
		</employmentNav>
		<customString24/>
		<userId>1</userId>
		<eventReason></eventReason>
		<customDouble1>1</customDouble1>
		<fte>1.0</fte>
		<employeeClassNav>
			<PicklistOption>
				<picklistLabels>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>Standard Employment(PL)</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
					<PicklistLabel>
						<label>Standard Employment(PL)</label>
					</PicklistLabel>
				</picklistLabels>
				<externalCode>1</externalCode>
			</PicklistOption>
		</employeeClassNav>
		<company>1</company>
		<location>1</location>
		<department>1</department>
	</EmpJob>
</rootEmpJob>

I am using this script

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil
import groovy.xml.XmlParser

Message processData(Message message) {
    // Get the incoming payload
    def body = message.getBody(java.lang.String) as String

    // Get the exchange property containing cust_A_WFM
    def custADPWFMPayload = message.getProperty('backup_call1') as String

    // Remove the XML declaration if present
    body = body.replaceFirst(/\<\?xml.*?\?\>/, "").trim()
    custAWFMPayload = custAWFMPayload.replaceFirst(/\<\?xml.*?\?\>/, "").trim()

    // Parse both XMLs
    def parser = new XmlParser(false, false) // Disable namespace aware parsing
    def rootEmpJob = parser.parseText(body)
    def rootADP = parser.parseText(custAWFMPayload)

    // Convert the rootADP to a map for easy lookup
    def adpMap = rootADP.cust_A_WFM.collectEntries { adp ->
        [adp.externalCodeNav.User.userId.text(), adp]
    }

    // Iterate over each EmpJob element and merge, or remove if no match
    def empJobsToRemove = []
    rootEmpJob.EmpJob.each { empJob ->
        def userId = empJob.userId.text()
        def correspondingA = aMap[userId]
        if (correspondingA) {
            // Create a new node for externalCodeOfcust_A_WFMNav if it doesn't exist
            def userNav = empJob.userNav[0]
            if (userNav) {
                def externalCodeOfcust_A_WFMNav = userNav.externalCodeOfcust_A_WFMNav ?: userNav.appendNode('externalCodeOfcust_A_WFMNav')
                // Append the corresponding ADP data
                externalCodeOfcust_A_WFMNav.append(correspondingA)
            }
        } else {
            // Add to the list of nodes to remove
            empJobsToRemove << empJob
        }
    }

    // Remove the unmatched EmpJob nodes
    empJobsToRemove.each { empJob ->
        rootEmpJob.remove(empJob)
    }

    // Convert the merged XML back to string and set it as the message body
    def mergedXml = XmlUtil.serialize(rootEmpJob)
    message.setBody(mergedXml)

    return message
}

But i get this error 

javax.script.ScriptException: org.codehaus.groovy.control.MultipleCompilationErrorsException: startup failed:
ADP_mergeXML_custADP_empData__Script.groovy: 3: unable to resolve class groovy.xml.XmlParser
@ line 3, column 1.
import groovy.xml.XmlParser
^

1 error
, cause: org.codehaus.groovy.control.MultipleCompilationErrorsException: startup failed:
ADP_mergeXML_custADP_empData__Script.groovy: 3: unable to resolve class groovy.xml.XmlParser
@ line 3, column 1.
import groovy.xml.XmlParser
^

1 error

entry.title: 🇩🇪 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Berlin, DE)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python. You do not need to have any background in the topic, but a lot of curiosity!

You'll become acquainted with how embedded Machine Learning in SAP HANA can be used to build ML models. In working through this CodeJam you'll also become familiar with how the SAP Business Application Studio can be used to work with Jupyter notebooks.

This is a free in-person event and is planned for Friday, June 28th in Berlin, Germany 🇩🇪 from 10:00 to 16:00 CEST (UTC+2). The language of the event and the content will be in English. The instructor is a Developer Advocate Vitaliy Rudnytskiy.

Every attendee must complete essential prerequisites before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: https://github.com/SAP-samples/hana-ml-py-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md.

The event is being hosted by Zalando Payments GmbH at
Mühlenstraße 13-19,
10243 Berlin, Germany

Note that spaces are limited: we can only accommodate 30 attendees.

Visit the SAP CodeJam group for more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees.

entry.title: Re: adobe form borders lines not getting extended
entry.content: The issue was resolved. I have taken a longer approach but it worked.

entry.title: Re: Support for a new cell-based custom formula in Microsoft Excel – SAP.SETDATA
entry.content: Performance issues have been really bad with this function and often time it throws error during upload process. However when someone closes and open the sheet again - it works absolutely fine. Is there a known SAP note on this or we have to resort to raising a ticket with SAP?

entry.title: Re: Groovy Script Parse Error
entry.content:
Hi,

Just remove this line: 

import groovy.xml.XmlParser

BR,

Andrzej

entry.title: Re: Is there a possibility to set default Item Category b...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Determination if Item Category in Sales Document based on Incoterms is not possible with Standard settings. 

You will need an enhancement in one of the User exit, possibly in MV45AFZZ. 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: How to enable an OData V4 service for anonymous access?
entry.content:
Hi Bharat,

you are right, the screen shots show ZODATAV4_2 since I created a second alias in order to take the screen shots after having first tested the setup with an alias called ZODATAV4.

So I fixed this now. Thanks for the hint.

Yes you are right, it will be sufficient to add the services you want to publish in that role. 
However you should still check whether you would not want to use several users and those several aliases.

I don't think that we will add such an alias as part of the standard since it can easily be created by customers themselves.

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: Re: Groovy Script Parse Error
entry.content:
Change your import on line 3 to - 

import groovy.util.XmlParser

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: What is the actual URL endpoint for using a deployment for chat completions in SAP AI Core?
entry.content:
I asked too early 🙂

The correct path is /v2/inference/deployments/<deployment id>/chat/completions?api-version=2023-05-15

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP AI Core: proxy deployment: url not found
entry.content: Try /v2/inference/deployments/<deployment id>/chat/completions?api-version=2023-05-15 as the path. That worked for me.

entry.title: JMS Dead Letter Queue Alert
entry.content:
Dear All,

What is the best way to alert admin when a DLQ queue is filled with some entries? Is there anyway we can move the entries to processing queue without manual intervention?

entry.title: I am looking for a report for Order Intake and Revenue.
entry.content:
Hi Community experts,

We have a business requirement where the business needs a report which contains Order Intake and Revenue values which would in turn gives us the information for Order Backlog.

Any leads on this topics would be really helpful and looking for any work around solution as well if there is no standard reports not available.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Re: Usage of Function module /SPE/DELV_RESET_DIST_STATUS to change the delivery distribution status
entry.content: Manage delivery change in ERP system via config setting - see "Delv/Chg"

entry.title: Dark Mode
entry.content:
Hi all,

is there a way to create « dark, light and system mode » in AppGyver?

Thank you for your help

#AppGyver #sapbuildapps

entry.title: Re: [BUG] Notification feed, doubles when multiple followed tags assigned
entry.content:
Hello, @Johan_H:

We've not been able to recreate this bug, and I can't find any records of anyone reporting a similar problem.

Was this a one-time error or do you see this happening consistently with notifications including multiple tags that you subscribe to?

Please let us know.

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: Changes are not visible in the MyInbox fiori app afte...
entry.content:
So,I received a reply for my incident after raising it to SAP.
It states that currently the MyInbox is not adaptation project ready(Q2/2024). Especially for view extensions. For controller hooks (the javascript code) it is possible to do such an extension but not for the views. Please refer to the below KBA.
0003040134 - Extending SAP Fiori MyInbox application using SAP Business Application Studio

entry.title: Re: Usage of Function module /SPE/DELV_RESET_DIST_STATUS to change the delivery distribution status
entry.content: but enabling changes to a delivery document after it has been distributed to EWM is such a bad option

entry.title: Re: sap mdk action bar style navigating from object list...
entry.content: I am unable to reproduce this.  At this point I would recommend opening a support case and include your mdkproject / metadata and reproduction steps so it can be investigated further

entry.title: Data extension Form for Digitally Signed Billing Documents (Portugal)
entry.content:
I need to extend the data source FDP_V3_BD_STANDARD_GLO_PT_SRV in order to add the outbound delivery number.

I have already tried to use the custom fields app, I tried to find this data source in the data source extension tab but I wasn't able to find it. I then tried to create a custom field (then i would apply a custom logic to it) under the Sales: Billing Document (SD_BILLINGDOC) business context but I was not able to find usage for the billing form templates.

Can you please help me find a way to solve this?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Release 2024.10
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud brings together analytics and planning with unique integration to SAP applications and seamless access to heterogenous data sources. It helps everyone in your organization make decisions without doubt with trusted insights and integrated plans.

This blog post introduces the features of the SAP Analytics Cloud 2024.10 release available for SAP Analytics Cloud FastTrack customers. For SAP Analytics Cloud Quarterly Release Cycle (QRC) customers, this release and its features will be available as part of the QRC Q3 2024 release. View the QRC release schedule here.

 

System Administration and Technical Requirements

 

Although not required, you may upgrade to the latest SAP Analytics Cloud agent version 1.0.405 to take advantage of all data acquisition types.

The agent’s minimum version remains at 1.0.75, with the following exceptions:

  • Version 1.0.99 for SAP ERP/SQL Database
  • Version 1.0.365 for SAP universe (UNX). The SAP Analytics Cloud agent requires additional setup steps, for more details see SAP Note 3262098
  • Version 1.0.353 for SAP Business Warehouse (BW)
  • Version 1.0.235 for SAP HANA View
  • Version 1.0.248 for File Server

For more information, see System Requirements and Technical Prerequisites.

Regarding supported features and required updates for the integration of SAP BW with SAP Analytics Cloud, refer to SAP Note 2541557 for further details.

Regarding supported features and required updates for live universe access through SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect with SAP Analytics Cloud, refer to SAP Note 2771921 for further details.

Please download the latest version of the Simple Deployment Kit from Software Center.

Note: To avoid downloading older versions and potentially exposing users to a vulnerable bundling of the Cloud Connector with SAPJVM, or Apache Tomcat, only the three latest versions of the kits are available to download.

For Cloud agent version change management details, refer to SAP Note 3264839.

 

Release Highlights

  • Administration and Service Management
    • Administrative-level control of sharing public and private files | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
  • Augmented Analytics
    • Forecast in chart support in optimized story experience
  • Enterprise Planning
    • Advanced Formulas – supporting the “any” hierarchy parameter | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
    • Data Actions – migration of existing allocation design time | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
  • Story Design
    • Descriptions for story calculations | (SAP Road Map Explorer)
    • Improved Linked Analysis with Visualization Drill

 

Administration and Service Management

 

Administrative-level control of sharing public and private files

Sharing privilege have been added in the Roles page on public and private files. This change allows the system administrator to enable or disable a user’s ability to share content that is saved in private or public folders. The rule will apply to the owner of a file as well. (SAP Road Map Explorer)

 

Augmented Analytics

 

Forecast in chart support in optimized story experience

Users can now add a forecast to time series or line charts in the optimized experience (view and design mode).

 

Enterprise Planning

 

Advanced Formulas – supporting the “any” hierarchy parameter

When designing advanced formulas, users can now include a data action parameter that has ANY type hierarchy, without the need to specify a hierarchy for the dimension the parameter is set on using CONFIG.HIERARCHY. This provides more flexibility by choosing the hierarchy to use when running the data action containing the advanced formulas. Note a parameter of date dimension with its hierarchy set to Any cannot be included. (SAP Road Map Explorer)

 

Data Actions – migration of existing allocation design time

Legacy allocations are currently only available to view and execute. Existing legacy allocations have been automatically migrated to data actions in the folder “Structured Allocations” on system upgrade. The legacy allocation designer has been disabled. New allocations can be created in the data action designer.

 

Story Design

 

Descriptions for story calculations

In the optimized story experience, when creating calculations and calculation input controls in the calculation editor, user can now provide both a Name (ID) and Description. If a Description is not provided, the ID will be used instead. This enhancement allows for creating multiple calculations with the same description. (SAP Road Map Explorer)

 

Improved Linked Analysis with Visualization Drill

In the optimized story experience, drilling up on a chart after drilling down on multiple members will now show the same results whether or not Linked Analysis is enabled.

 

This blog post only provides a high-level overview of the latest features and enhancements of SAP Analytics Cloud. You can find mor details on these features in your In-App Help Guide for FastTrack customers and see this SAP Knowledge Base Article if you’d like to learn more about FastTrack and Quarterly Release Cycle releases.

If you have any questions regarding the content in this blog, you can comment below. If you have product specific of technical questions, post a question to our SAP Analytics Cloud Questions & Answers forum. Check out our SAP Road Map Explorer to see more upcoming features of SAP Analytics Cloud.

entry.title: Re: How to Load Master Data into a Dimension through Flat File Using Analytic Application
entry.content:
Hello, Thank you very much.

I changed the code to match my requirement but when i add the custom widget to the story, i'm getting this error! The github links in the main are opening fine.

Can you please advise ?

Regards

entry.title: Collaborative MDK Development Best Practices
entry.content:
I'm hoping to get some advice from the MDK community on best practices for collaborative development. Our team is running into some issues with the deploy-to-test workflow when multiple developers are working on the same app.

The Problem:

We're finding that if one developer deploys their changes to the app to test, it overwrites the changes that another developer may have deployed previously. This can lead to lost work and frustration.

Our Current Setup:

  • We're using MDK for mobile app development.
  • We have multiple developers working on different parts of the app simultaneously.
  • We're deploying to a shared development environment for testing.

SAP Mobile Services

entry.title: BAPI to Cancel specific line items from billing documet
entry.content: I have a Billing Document having 10 Line items and I want to cancel 2 line items out of it. VF11 provides facility to select specific line items and process it for cancellation. I am looking for a BAPI for above purpose to use in custom program.

entry.title: Re: Ruby API returns different result based on same SQL but prepared vs execute_direct
entry.content:
Hello,

I can't seem to reproduce this behaviour with a simplified example:

 

require 'hanaclient'
include HANACLIENT

@@api = HANACLIENT::HANACLIENTInterface.new()
HANACLIENT::API.hanaclient_initialize_interface(@@api)
@@api.hanaclient_init()
@@conn = @@api.hanaclient_new_connection()
@@api.hanaclient_connect(@@conn, "servernode=myserver:30015;UID=myuser;PWD=mypwd")

sql = <<-END_SQL
            select 42 from "SYS"."DUMMY" where 1 = ?
        END_SQL
item_code = 1

stmt = @@api.hanaclient_prepare @@conn, sql
_, param = @@api.hanaclient_describe_bind_param(stmt, 0)
param.set_value(item_code)
@@api.hanaclient_bind_param(stmt, 0, param)
_rc = @@api.hanaclient_execute(stmt)
@@api.hanaclient_fetch_next( stmt )

puts "R1: " + @@api.hanaclient_get_column(stmt, 0).to_s
@@api.hanaclient_free_stmt(stmt)

@@api.hanaclient_disconnect(@@conn)
@@api.hanaclient_free_connection(@@conn)
@@api.hanaclient_fini()
HANACLIENT::API.hanaclient_finalize_interface(@@api)

 

 

 

Can you also run my example and see the correct value?

From your example, are you sure that the value being bound is being found correctly in the table? Have you tried adding SQLDBC Tracing 

to your application to better understand what's happening inside the driver for the bind value and result? You can quickly set environment variables to trace to stdout if that's helpful:

 

export HDB_SQLDBC_TRACEFILE=stdout
export HDB_SQLDBC_TRACEOPTS=SQL,DEBUG,FLUSH

Best regards,

Jeff

entry.title: Re: Service broker destination-service-broker failed

If it's not available in Stories, any workaround on how to get the total team size?

entry.content:
Hello,

I have the same problem, were you able to solve this problem?

Please, could you help me

Thanks

KR.

entry.title: Re: Error in SOAP Sender adapter SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Faisal,

This is a well-known issue. The only workaround I know is to use API Management.
In APIM you can configure API proxy between your source system and CPI.
After successful authentication you can remove Web Service Security record from your message and add a basic authentication.
Of course you will have to add WS-Security on the CPI side. You can configure it in your SOAP receiver adapter in the WS-Security tab.
If it wouldn't be possible then you can store WS Security record somewhere in the message (maybe encoded in base64) in APIM and then restore this record on CPI side.

BR,

Andrzej

entry.title: Configuring Fee rate structure in SAP FG
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement where the worker works on certain days for certain hours in the contingent module. Now, they are paid per/hr basis on the time that they work. For example 95$ per hour. This is additional fee that the workers work other than their normal working hrs. i.e 8hrs per day. This needs to be in Contingent and not with SOW fees. 

How this fee can be configured in the system with all the rates (ST, OT available) and when worker selects that fee in timesheet, only the amount 95$ is calculated based on the no.of hrs worked. Please provide your inputs or let me know if any more information required.  

SAP Fieldglass Vendor Management System SAP Spend Performance Management #contingent

entry.title: Re: "Option loop" in a report custom function
entry.content: Hi Patrick, most likely Option Loop is not available for use inside a Custom Function. In the Formula Workshop, if you compare the Operators > Control Structures for Report Custom Functions vs Formula Fields, the "option loop maxiterations" is only there for Formula Fields.

entry.title: irpa_core.error.Error when calling an action in SAP BUILD Process Automation
entry.content:
I'm getting rhe following error when calling an action in an automation.

 

irpa_core.error.Error
Action execution failed with the following error: WS MESSAGE TIMEOUT: we did not received the message ExchangeToken_184 (timeout = 30000 ms)."
 
Calling the action directly using the test facility works fine.

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay - Basis Calculation
entry.content: Thanks Cat! So is there no standard solution in Variable Pay without doing additional configuration in EC?

entry.title: WSAECONNRESET: Connection reset by peer. Multiple users, multiple locations, can't pinpoint..
entry.content:
We are having an issue that started about 5 months ago where users will get kicked off SAP and log the error: "WSAECONNRESET: Connection reset by peer."

We have eliminated the issue being a particular user, computer, OS, and site.. We have seen this issue at all of our locations and there appears to be no specific reason that we can find at this time..  

It happens randomly to multiple users during random times of the day. As an example, a user got disconnected 17 times yesterday (0514/2024) in addition to many other users. The prior day she didn't get disconnected at all and she was doing the same functions in SAP on the same computer at the same site.. 

I wanted to see if there were any network drops that could be causing it so we did a running ping to a log file from her machine to the SAP Production server (which is hosted). There was no packet loss and the RTT was good during the times she got disconnected. We are now looking to dive deeper and according to SAP documentation, the NIPING tool is what is suggested. 

We have no experience with this tool but it seems to suggest you need to run it on the application server in a listen mode and then run it on a client.. Does this seem like a next logical step? We have reached out to our cloud provider who hosts our SAP servers to see if they will do this and waiting to hear back..

Meanwhile, anyone have any ideas of what to look at?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
Hi Wai Wai,

Could you be more concrete about what the system is not doing? 

Where is your challenge?

Have you looked into Manage Workflows for purchase Requisition?

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/bacc21e14d6c4b0fbf53dca3218abdd5.html?locale=en-US

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP - Access Table HDI in a different space deplo...
entry.content:
Many thanks @junwu ! That solved the issue. Very much appreciated. Now everything is deployed successfully.

Now I am encountering a odd stuff. Let´s see if you could help.

I have a service created on the tabe of the external HDI.

 

service ServicesService {

    entity servicesView as projection on dm.ZPMSERVLOC;

}
 
But the associated View is not created in the external HDI container although I can see it generated in the gen folder.
 
Any idea what can be the issue?
Many thanks in advance!
C.

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between Length, Decimal Places...
entry.content: No, NETPR(11,2) means a total of 11 digits maximum, of which 2 are decimals.

entry.title: Re: [BUG] Notification feed, doubles when multiple followed tags assigned
entry.content: I don't remember this kind of bug. I'll check cautiously in case it happens.

Also, what is the best practice to take the Objects backup?

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: What is the difference between Length, Decimal Places...
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi You are right. I read what I wrote it carefully. What I meant for "Length" and my examples don't match! Thanks for the warning!

entry.title: Re: tips and tricks around BAdI IDOC_DATA_MAPPER
entry.content:
Ok, then the BAdI is executed like the IDoc Conversion Rules: They only run when IDoc is written to database (as far as I remember).

I will add a new headline after "Check use of IDoc Conversion Rules first" with some text to pay attention in which situation the BAdI is triggered. Thanks for your hint, @pbist.

Any advices from your site which customer enhancements to use for BD87?

entry.title: Comprehensive Overview of the Compostable Storefront in our NEW Learning Program
entry.content:
With an effective, multi-functional online platform, businesses can maximize customer engagement, elevate user experience, foster customer retention, and stimulate growth.

SAP Composable Storefront  is open-source frontend for SAP Commerce Cloud, allows developers to build innovative, multi-dimensional web applications that are not simply responsive and fast but are also highly customizable to suit the unique requirements of any business.

 The Learning Program is designed to fulfil three main objectives:

 ·       Familiarize  with the principles of composable architecture and how they apply to e-commerce storefronts.

·       Equip with the skills needed to proficiently use the SAP Commerce Cloud platform for building and managing e-commerce storefronts.

·       Empower  to design and customize storefronts using the SAP Composable Storefront approach.

The approach of SAP Composable Storefront for designing and customizing storefronts aligns well with the current market trends, which are rapidly moving towards microservices, API-first, cloud-native, and headless commerce. This approach enables businesses to adopt a composable commerce architecture that is modular, flexible, and can be tailored according to evolving business needs and customer preferences.

If you're an application consultant, operational manager, software developer, architect, or simply a business visionary, this educational program about SAP Composable Storefront is for you.

Any questions? Please, contact the Value map team! 

Sign up for the SAP Enterprise Support value maps by requesting access to SAP Learning Hub or join the SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps Learning Room if you already have access.

 

Mónica Domingo

Global Topic Owner - SAP Customer Experience Solutions

entry.title: Re: Implementation Tips - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, inbound invoicing option for Brazil
entry.content:
Hi @claudia_wada ,

Does this require the BTP DRC component of Brazil NOTA FISCAL is totally an S4 based solution?

Thanks,

Vijay

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytic Cloud Usage Tracking Content will be replaced with new System Overview (Admin Conte
entry.content:
Hello,

Marcos

entry.title: Re: Using BAPIs in RAP
entry.content:
Hello, 

Many thanks for your guidance. I am facing a problem with BAPI call during SAVE_MODIFIED execution (scenario is managed, with unmanaged save and unmanaged lock): as lock is created during draft creation, and works fine, it causes failure during BAPI execution, as entity is locked (by the same user). Is there any way to overcome this? Some method to remove lock at SAVE_MODIFIED beginning?

Many thanks in advance!

Maciej

entry.title: Re: Doing a Proof of Concept for BTP Application Monitoring with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hello Amey

There was a webcast-series by the SAP Community YouTube Channel just recently : "SAP Cloud ALM for SAP BTP Operations". The link will guide you to a number of resources, such as related video's and documentation. From what I've observed, the CALM for BTP is relatively new, and there might be some "insights and evolutions" as to what is possible now and what is possible in the near future.

A relevant solution could be "Cloud ALM for Operations" and there is a central "Expert Portal" page for this as a starting point : link.

If you want to proceed hands-on, I would suggest you go through the "SAP Discovery Center Mission - Get Started with SAP Cloud ALM for Operations" or search for other relevant Missions related to "CALM".

Update : I found a Developer-Tutorial to do Monitoring via "CALM" on BTP-ABAP Environment : link

I hope this helps

Nic T.

entry.title: SAP MII does not automatically create the Authorization header with the informed credential
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Has anyone ever experienced this?
I want to make an HTTP Post using Basic Authentication.
But it seems that SAP MII does not automatically create the Authorization header with the informed credential.

When I send the header with the credential, everything works. But I can't do it this way, because I can't have access to the password that is entered in the SAP MII Credential Store.

Does anyone have any clues on how to resolve this?

entry.title: Re: Life Cycle Management in SAP Datasphere: Transporting Content between Tenants
entry.content:
Since this will be a SOX-relevant system for my company, I have a couple questions:

1 - can this be ChaRM enabled for controls and governance?

2 - is the transport mgt process similar to BTP?

3 - what reporting is available for the transport mgt processes?

entry.title: Re: [BUG] Notification feed, doubles when multiple followed tags assigned
entry.content:
Thank you for the additional input, everyone. We're going to continue to investigate. If you find that it's still happening consistently, please share screenshots.

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: Homepage banner sizing with 1H 2024 release
entry.content: Hi Mireille, yes I have noticed this too. We have exactly the same banner image settings in Preview and Production but the Preview instance is showing a rectanglular image covering the entire screen rather than with the rounded egdes. I've raised a case with SAP.

entry.title: Re: R2R Series Blog #15: Payments and Bank Communication in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

What are the options for S4HANA on-premise?

 

Thanks 

Saurabh
